task_description: Rewrite the OMR scanning system to use ArUco markers for robust corner detection instead of plain black squares with contour-based detection. Add QR code metadata to sheets. The current system always returns 0% because perspective correction fails with real phone photos.

verification.summary: All verifications pass: pip install succeeds, imports work, self-test achieves 10/10 with student number 12 detected, robustness test with 3-degree rotation + 70% scale also achieves 10/10. bot.py not modified.
